Enter Token ID
This market wasn't found in your positions, so we can't look up its token ID automatically. To show a price chart, paste the token ID below.

How to find it: Open the market on Opinion, open DevTools (F12) → Network tab, look for a price-history request and copy the token_id value from the URL.

Leave blank to add without a chart.
